rules.rule: Flag changes that may alter Markdown output semantics, structural correctness, or edge-case conversion behavior without explicit tests.
Streaming conversion must preserve incomplete UTF-8 tails across chunk boundaries and flush charset decoder state at EOF; avoid lossy conversion shortcuts that mask boundary bugs.
Sanitizer logic must preserve HTML semantics: treat void elements correctly, keep dangerous-element skip mode name-aware, and keep nesting-depth accounting saturation-safe.
Do not swallow or remap converter errors in ways that lose original error classification needed by fallback behavior, cache semantics, or observability.
Flag changes that introduce unbounded growth, unnecessary full-buffer copies, or repeated parsing in incremental or large-response conversion paths.
